title: salvia verbenaca subsp. lanigera
intro: Salvia verbenaca subsp. lanigera, also known as woolly sage, is a subspecies of perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia verbenaca subsp. lanigera include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of woolly sage can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used as an ingredient in some traditional remedies.
